current_activity.work_summary: Environment Variables Best Practice Implementation: (1) Consolidated all credentials to .env file as single source of truth, (2) Moved ZERODHA_API_KEY and ZERODHA_API_SECRET from system environment to .env, (3) Consolidated PERPLEXITY_API_KEYS to comma-separated format in .env, (4) Created .env.example template for new developers, (5) Removed ZERODHA and PERPLEXITY exports from ~/.zshrc and ~/.bash_profile, (6) Updated CLAUDE.md with environment variables section. Key finding: Backend uses python-dotenv's load_dotenv() which reads .env file directly, NOT from parent shell environment.

notes.project_context: Autonomous Claude Paper Trader & Portfolio Analyzer
critical_constraints: Queue AI analysis tasks to prevent token exhaustion
env_vars_best_practice: ALL credentials in .env file only (single source of truth)
NEVER export credentials in shell startup files
Use .env.example as template for new developers
Backend uses load_dotenv() to read .env file directly
OAuth tokens auto-saved to .env after authentication
notes.next_action: Test Kite Connect integration with live prices - restart backend and trigger morning session
